name: Banana & Lemon Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ripe Bananas, peeled and mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together the sugar, nutmeg, salt, and lemon juice.
2. Add the banana mixture to the spice mixture and stir gently until well combined.
3. Heat a skillet over medium heat and add enough oil to coat the bottom of the pan.
4. Using a crêpe recipe (see above), make each crepe on both sides in the hot oil, ensuring they are cooked evenly.
5. Place each cooked crepe onto a serving plate and spread with melted margarine.
6. Pour some of the banana mixture over the melted margarine, spreading it out evenly across the surface of the crepe.
7. Sprinkle the crepes generously with icing sugar to taste.
8. Garnish with lemon wedges before serving.
